allow:
Bash(cat /Users/daniel.fonyo/.claude/projects/-Users-daniel-fonyo-Projects-brain/9b74c638-ff89-4080-a027-9140ef82f865/tool-results/toolu_01MdhgVowR2nH3uPKhXkASZa.json | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
text = data[0]['text']
# Extract the JSON result from the text
start = text.index\('{'\)
end = text.rindex\('}'\) + 1
result = json.loads\(text[start:end]\)
print\(f\\"maxScroll: {result['maxScroll']}\\"\)
print\(f\\"Carousels found: {len\(result['allCarousels']\)}\\"\)
print\(\)
for c in result['allCarousels']:
    print\(f\\"  {c['title']} \({c['carouselId']}\)\\"\)
    print\(f\\"    2nd pass: {c['secondPassScore']}, stores: {c['storeCount']}, nextClicks: {c['nextClicks']}\\"\)
    if c['storeCount'] > 0:
        for s in c['stores'][:5]:
            print\(f\\"      {s['name']} \(id={s['id']}, score={s['score']}\)\\"\)
        if c['storeCount'] > 5:
            print\(f\\"      ... +{c['storeCount']-5} more\\"\)
    print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)
